sentiment.reasoning: Recognition for cloud infrastructure excellence enhances reputation but lacks immediate quantifiable financial impact.

sentiment.reasoning: Duplicate industry award recognition provides marginal incremental brand value.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
